description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow featuring a flat roof and a multi-level design with extensive use of glass for windows and doors. The structure is predominantly white and gray, with clean, geometric lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The property includes a spacious outdoor area with a swimming pool, rooftop garden, and landscaped greenery, including tall, slender trees and hedges. The front facade showcases large floor-to-ceiling windows and a covered patio area, while the rear includes a garage and additional green spaces. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with open terraces and rooftop spaces. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed bungalow with extensive glass windows, rooftop gardens, a swimming pool, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, covered patio, pool, and tall trees lining the side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the garage, rooftop garden, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long expanse of windows, terrace, and a shaded outdoor area.
description_view_3: Back view with dense greenery, the pool, and a clear view of the rooftop garden and flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and grouped side windows
